sourceRef: tip:Handling a late-term credit change cleanly

slides.headline: Streamline late-term credit changes
slides.body: Automate and simplify GIBill credit updates for students who drop out.

slides.headline: Automate credit calculations
slides.body: Easily recalculate credits without manual intervention.

slides.headline: Track compliance
slides.body: Automatically track and document credit changes for audit readiness.

slides.headline: Support students
slides.body: Quickly notify students about credit changes for a seamless transition.

slides.headline: Effortless reporting
slides.body: Generate detailed reports for easy review and management.

slides.headline: Compliance matters
slides.body: Maintain compliance with the latest VA regulations.

outline.caption: Streamline late-term credit changes for students who drop out. Automate calculations, track compliance, and support students through the transition. Learn more: Link in bio.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 3, which could benefit from a more compelling headline to match the others.
